name: North Platte River - Lusby PAA (Grey Reef)
notes: WGFD Public Access Area off WY-220; primitive ramp, ~2.1 miles of bank access on the Grey Reef tailwater.

name: North Platte River - Miracle Mile PAA
notes: Below Kortes Dam; two parking areas, 2+ miles of access. Unpaved road, impassable when wet.

name: North Platte River - Bixby PAA
notes: WGFD bank access on the Grey Reef-to-Casper reach; coordinates approximate.

name: North Platte River - South Douglas PAA
notes: WGFD bank access upstream of Douglas; coordinates approximate.

name: North Platte River - Guernsey PAA
notes: WGFD bank access at the town of Guernsey.
